name: Hollywood Mogul 4
short_description: Own the studio. Run the studio. Make the movies. Play Hollywood Mogul 4 and run your own Hollywood movie studio in a complex, immersive, business strategy simulation that is TEXT-BASED with NO GRAPHICS and MINIMAL SOUND.
detailed_description:
Hollywood Mogul 4 is a deep, complex TEXT-BASED strategy game. This business simulation puts you in charge of your own Hollywood movie studio. It is an immersive tycoon game about creating, producing, casting, and releasing movies and limited series around the world.

TEXT-BASED strategy business management simulation

NO GRAPHICS

MINIMAL SOUND

If you are new to the Hollywood Mogul games, please don't make a $300 million sci-fi epic the moment the game's installed. Hollywood Mogul 4 is a fairly complex business management simulation.

Make a few smaller movies first at Difficulty Level 1. Give yourself some time to understand the attribute rating nuances for Visual Effects and Story Scope, genre, and character development, pace, plot twists, sub-plots, and Set Design. Not to mention how those things will relate to the Director's ratings in Perfectionist and Script As Written, On-Budget, and Effects, as well as if it's better to cast the lead role with a talent that has a high Sex Appeal rating but a low Humility rating because their Screen Presence is a little lacking.

Also, the necessary Advertising Budget will bankrupt your studio.

So please don't make a $300 million sci-fi epic right off the bat.

WHAT'S STILL HERE FROM HM3

o Choose from more than 100 genres.

o Include Additional Villains like weather, or fire, or insect infestations.

o Set advertising budgets.

o Sign Distribution Agreements and pre-sell your project domestically or in 19 foreign markets.

WHAT'S NEW IN HOLLYWOOD MOGUL 4

o Make movies released in theaters around the world, or straight to a streaming service.

o Make Limited Series up to 24 episodes with 30, 60, 90, or 120 minute running times.

o Choose projects from more than 14,000 source material records, or use your own ideas.

o Every talent record has stats as Actor, Director, and Writer.

o Hire a Talent to act, and also as Director and/or Writer.

o Audition actors from more than 8,000 talent records.

o Follow talent with Stats that increase. Or decrease.

o Hire your favorite talent now, before a box office smash increases their salary.

o Identify Potential Conflicts between the director you hire and the talent you cast in Perfection rating and Script As Written rating. And deal with the Production Problem cost overruns if they don't get along. Because who knows, it might be lightning in a bottle.

o Look for that elusive green dollar sign ($) that tells you the $10 million dollar movie star loves your project so much they're willing to work for just $350,000. Plus a heap of points on the back end.

o Using HM4 Talent or HM4 Source you can now merge databases. You no longer have to create a 10,000 record database all by yourself.

o Win Awards for movies and series

o Set character role attributes and add or delete roles.

o Set production budgets, add Stunts, and Visual Effects or Creature Effects, and shoot in one city or a dozen cities around the world.

o Sign contracts with manufacturers for project merchandise.

o Set your project in a Universe with other projects.

o Create Franchises.

o Create Cross-over projects from Franchises or Universes and mix and match roles and talent from every project you've already released.

o Create Traditional sequels, Spin Off sequels, and IP sequels.

Play Hollywood Mogul 4 and run your own Hollywood movie studio.
